name: @dotenc/cli
description: 🔐 Git-native encrypted environments powered by your SSH keys
author: Ivan Filho <i@ivanfilho.com>

scripts.build: bun build src/cli.ts --outdir dist --target node --packages external
scripts.build:binary: bun run build:binary:darwin-arm64 && bun run build:binary:darwin-x64 && bun run build:binary:linux-x64 && bun run build:binary:linux-arm64 && bun run build:binary:windows-x64
scripts.test: bun test src/tests/authGrantCommand.test.ts src/tests/authPurgeCommand.test.ts src/tests/authRevokeCommand.test.ts src/tests/configCommand.test.ts src/tests/envCreateCommand.test.ts src/tests/envDeleteCommand.test.ts src/tests/envListCommand.test.ts src/tests/envRotateCommand.test.ts src/tests/keyListCommand.test.ts src/tests/keyRemoveCommand.test.ts src/tests/whoamiCommand.test.ts && bun test src/tests/dev.test.ts src/tests/runCommand.test.ts src/tests/update.test.ts src/tests/install-agent-skill.test.ts src/tests/install-vscode-extension.test.ts src/tests/keyAddCommand.test.ts src/tests/envDecryptCommand.test.ts src/tests/envEncryptCommand.test.ts src/tests/initCommand.test.ts src/tests/parseEnv.test.ts src/tests/createHash.test.ts src/tests/getEnvironmentByPath.test.ts src/tests/getKeyFingerprint.test.ts src/tests/parseOpenSSHKey.test.ts src/tests/environmentExists.test.ts src/tests/getEnvironmentNameSuggestion.test.ts src/tests/setupGitDiff.test.ts src/tests/getPrivateKeyByName.test.ts src/tests/isPassphraseProtected.test.ts src/tests/validatePublicKey.test.ts src/tests/homeConfig.test.ts src/tests/getPublicKeys.test.ts src/tests/getEnvironmentByName.test.ts src/tests/getCurrentKeyName.test.ts src/tests/initAndCreateHints.test.ts src/tests/createEd25519SshKey.test.ts src/tests/getEnvironments.test.ts src/tests/choosePublicKeyPrompt.test.ts src/tests/envCreateSafety.test.ts src/tests/envEditCommand.test.ts src/tests/promptWrappers.test.ts src/tests/updateNotifier.test.ts src/tests/mockupdateCommand.test.ts src/tests/getDefaultEditor.test.ts src/tests/encryptEnvironment.test.ts src/tests/validateEnvironmentName.test.ts src/tests/validateKeyName.test.ts src/tests/decryptEnvironment.test.ts src/tests/resolveProjectRoot.test.ts src/tests/buildAncestorChain.test.ts src/tests/findEnvironmentsRecursive.test.ts src/tests/getPublicKeyByName.test.ts src/tests/splitCommand.test.ts src/tests/choosePrivateKeyPrompt.test.ts src/tests/getPrivateKeys.test.ts src/tests/parsePassphraseProtectedPrivateKey.test.ts src/tests/createPasswordlessSshKeyCopy.test.ts src/tests/crypto.test.ts
scripts.test:e2e: docker build -t dotenc-e2e -f e2e/Dockerfile .. && docker run --rm dotenc-e2e
scripts.test:e2e:coverage: rm -rf coverage-e2e && mkdir -p coverage-e2e && docker build -t dotenc-e2e -f e2e/Dockerfile .. && docker build -t dotenc-e2e-coverage -f e2e/Dockerfile.coverage .. && docker run --rm -v "$(pwd)/coverage-e2e:/cov" dotenc-e2e-coverage
